source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-functional-foundations  Behavior parameterization and lambdas Modern Java

summary: Modern Java starts by passing behavior through lambdas and functional interfaces so repeated traversal or decision code can be reduced without hiding intent.
title: Behavior parameterization and lambdas

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-stream-pipelines  Stream API pipeline discipline Stream pipelines support

summary: Stream pipelines support declarative collection processing, but backend use should keep transformations readable and business side effects explicit.
title: Stream API pipeline discipline

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-collectors  Collectors and grouping Collectors turn stream elements into l

summary: Collectors turn stream elements into lists, maps, groups, and custom accumulated results, which is useful for read-model and reporting transformations.
title: Collectors and grouping

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-parallel-streams  Parallel stream risk review Parallel streams can use mul

summary: Parallel streams can use multiple cores, but backend services must review shared mutable state, ordering, blocking calls, and measurement before adopting them.
title: Parallel stream risk review

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-optional-boundaries  Optional as absence boundary Optional helps model abs

summary: Optional helps model absent lookup results or optional relationships when used consistently at boundaries rather than as a universal replacement for all nulls.
title: Optional as absence boundary

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-date-time  Modern date and time modeling LocalDate, LocalTime, Instant, Du

summary: LocalDate, LocalTime, Instant, Duration, and Period support clearer temporal modeling for domain rules, API contracts, and persistence mappings.
title: Modern date and time modeling

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-default-methods  Default methods and interface evolution Default methods l

summary: Default methods let interfaces evolve with behavior while preserving compatibility, but backend ports should avoid adding policy by accident.
title: Default methods and interface evolution

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-completablefuture  CompletableFuture async composition CompletableFuture s

summary: CompletableFuture supports asynchronous composition and concurrent calls, but backend use must make executor, timeout, error, and cancellation choices explicit.
title: CompletableFuture async composition

summary: 보강 지식은 Spliterator로 병렬 스트림의 분할 비용을 점검하고, 람다 중심 리팩터링으로 코드 의도를 개선하며, Flow API로 비동기 흐름을 리액티브 모델까지 확장한다.
title: Performance, refactoring, and reactive extension

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-lambda-readability-boundaries  Lambda readability boundaries 동작 전달, method

summary: 동작 전달, method reference, 캡처 제약, 타입 추론을 읽기 쉬운 함수형 경계로 묶는다.
title: Lambda readability boundaries

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-stream-collector-risks  Stream collector risks stream pipeline, collector,

summary: stream pipeline, collector, 재사용, side effect, parallel splitting 위험을 처리 흐름 관점으로 요약한다.
title: Stream collector risks

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-absence-time-interface-evolution  Absence, time, interface evolution Optio

summary: Optional, date/time, default method를 API 의미와 진화 비용 관점으로 묶는다.
title: Absence, time, interface evolution

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-async-reactive-backend-style  Async reactive backend style CompletionStage

summary: CompletionStage, common pool, Flow backpressure, backend pipeline을 비동기 경계로 정리한다.
title: Async reactive backend style
